title: Monolithic Truth
description: Detects when systems enforce a single 'right' answer or perspective, collapsing multiple valid truths into one and suppressing diversity of scope, culture, or angle.
indicators: Multiple perspectives treated as errors rather than valid alternatives
Cultural or contextual truths reduced to one dominant frame
Alignment protocols overriding nuance with enforced certainty

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
